words.def: the front of the human head from the forehead to the chin and ear to ear
words.zh: n. 臉面；臉色；表面（face的複數）

words.def: the front of the human head from the forehead to the chin and ear to ear
words.zh: n. 臉, 面容, 正面, 外觀
n. 情形, 情況, 箱, 容器, 事實, 病例, 案例, 框子

words.def: strongbox where valuables can be safely kept
words.zh: n. 保險箱, 冷藏室
